title: Decadent German Apple Pudding
description: A sweet and molten German dessert featuring dark brown soft sugar, air-fried to perfection in a banana leaf vessel, this dish is sure to impress your loved ones.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, dark brown soft sugar, and cinnamon.
Add the sliced apples to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the sugar mixture.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted butter, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the bowl with the apples and mix until everything is well combined.
Lay a banana leaf flat on a work surface and spoon one quarter of the apple mixture onto the center of the leaf.
Fold the banana leaf over the filling to form a square package, and repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Place the packages in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each package.
Cook the packages in the air fryer for 12 minutes, or until they are golden brown and the apples are tender.
